name: HRC_ALERT_RUNS
description: Contains alert run data with totals no of success, error and warning counts.

columns.Name: RUN_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key column.

columns.Name: PARENT_RUN_ID
columns.Comments: Run Identifier of Parent. Foreign Key to HRC_ALERTS_RUNS.RUN_ID

columns.Name: ALERT_ID
columns.Comments: Alert Identifier. Foreign Key to HRC_ALERTS_B.ALERT_ID

columns.Name: RUN_START
columns.Comments: Specifies the start of the run activity.

columns.Name: RUN_END
columns.Comments: Specifies the end of the run activity.

columns.Name: REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the request ID of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Determines the status of the activity run. Valid values are defined in lookup of HRC_ALERT_RUN_STATUS.

columns.Name: USER_IDENTIFIER
columns.Comments: User Identifier.

columns.Name: RUN_PHASE
columns.Comments: Run Phase of child job

columns.Name: PARAMETERS
columns.Comments: Contains parameters values for the run.

columns.Name: RUN_OPTIONS
columns.Comments: Contains config run option values for the run.

columns.Name: LOG
columns.Comments: Contains a log for the activity run.

columns.Name: TOTAL_ALERT_INSTANCES
columns.Comments: The total number of Alert Instances raised

columns.Name: TOTAL_MESSAGES
columns.Comments: The total number of messages created for the run. TOTAL_SUCCESS_MESSAGES + TOTAL_WARNING_MESSAGES + TOTAL_ERROR_MESSAGES

columns.Name: TOTAL_WARNINGS
columns.Comments: Total number of warnings.

columns.Name: TOTAL_ERRORS
columns.Comments: The total number or errors for the run.

columns.Name: TOTAL_KEEPS
columns.Comments: Total number of keeps.

columns.Name: TOTAL_SUCCESS_MESSAGES
columns.Comments: Total number of successful messages.

columns.Name: TOTAL_WARNING_MESSAGES
columns.Comments: Total number of warning messages.

columns.Name: TOTAL_ERROR_MESSAGES
columns.Comments: Total number of error messages

columns.Name: TOTAL_KEEP_MESSAGES
columns.Comments: Total number of keep messages.

columns.Name: TOTAL_SUCCESS_RECIPIENTS
columns.Comments: Total number of successful recipients.

columns.Name: TOTAL_ERROR_RECIPIENTS
columns.Comments: Total number of recipients in error for an error message

columns.Name: TOTAL_WARNING_RECIPIENTS
columns.Comments: Total number of warning recipients.

columns.Name: TOTAL_KEEP_RECIPIENTS
columns.Comments: Total number of keep recipients.

columns.Name: RUN_GROUP_NAME
columns.Comments: Phase1 Run Group Identifier.

columns.Name: RUN_CANCEL_FLAG
columns.Comments: Identifier used to detect cancelation of a run.

columns.Name: RUN_INT_VALUE1
columns.Comments: Used to store Internal Value for a run.

columns.Name: RUN_INT_VALUE2
columns.Comments: Used to store Internal Value for a run.

columns.Name: RUN_INT_VALUE3
columns.Comments: Used to store Internal Value for a run.

columns.Name: RUN_INT_VALUE4
columns.Comments: Used to store Internal Value for a run.

columns.Name: RETRY_COUNT
columns.Comments: Number of Retries.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
